regexCodeList.string: ^Congratulations, that was one of your CAMPAIGN mobs\!$
^You may take a campaign at this level\.$
^You are not currently on a campaign\.$
^You have .+ left to finish this campaign\.$
^Use 'cp check' to see only targets that you still need to kill\.$
^You will no longer receive experience\. Happy questing\!$
^You will now receive experience\. Happy leveling\!$
^You will have to level before you can go on another campaign\.$
^You have now joined Global Quest # (\d+)\. See 'help gquest' for available commands\.$
^Global Quest: Global quest # (\d+) for levels (\d+) to (\d+)(?: - .*)? has now started\.$
^[Cc][Oo][Nn][Gg][Rr][Aa][Tt][Uu][Ll][Aa][Tt][Ii][Oo][Nn][Ss], that was one of the GLOBAL QUEST mobs\!$
^Global Quest: Global Quest # (\d+) has been won by ([A-Z][A-Za-z]+) - \d*(?:1st|2nd|3rd|\dth) win\.$
^Global Quest: Global quest # (\d+)(?: \(extended\))? is now over\.$
^You are no longer part of Global Quest # (\d+) and will be unable to rejoin\.$
^You are not in a global quest\.$
^.+ tells you 'As a reward, I am giving you (\d+) quest points and (\d+) gold\.'$
^You receive (\d+) bonus quest points from your daily blessing\.$
^You get lucky and gain an extra (\d+) quest points\.$
^You seem unable to hunt that target for some reason\.$
^No one in this area by the name '.+'\.$|^You couldn\'t find a path to .+ from here\.$|^No one in this area by that name\.$
^Not while you are fighting\!|^You can\'t hunt while (?:resting|sitting)\.$|^You dream about going on a nice hunting trip, with pony rides, and campfires too\.$

Alias.name: sndreload
Alias.script:
-- Manual reload command local function resolveProfileDir() local home = getMudletHomeDir() local profile = getProfileName and getProfileName() or "" if profile ~= "" then local candidate = home .. "/profiles/" .. profile if io.exists(candidate) then return candidate end end return home end
local profileDir = resolveProfileDir() local path = profileDir .. "/SearchAndDestroy/" if not io.exists(path .. "snd_main.lua") then path = profileDir .. "/snd/" end cecho("<orange>[S&D]<reset> <cyan>Attempting manual reload from " .. path .. "<reset>
")
-- Clear existing snd object _G.snd = nil _G.snd_loader_in_progress = nil
-- Load modules in order local modules = { "snd_utils.lua", "snd_debug.lua", "snd_data.lua", "snd_main.lua", "snd_gmcp.lua", "snd_database.lua", "snd_campaign.lua", "snd_gquest.lua", "snd_conwin.lua", "snd_triggers.lua", "snd_commands.lua", "snd_navigation.lua", "snd_gui.lua", }
local loadedCount = 0 for _, module in ipairs(modules) do local fullPath = path .. module if io.exists(fullPath) then local ok, err = pcall(dofile, fullPath) if ok then loadedCount = loadedCount + 1 cecho("<green>[OK]<reset> " .. module .. "
") else cecho("<red>[FAIL]<reset> " .. module .. ": " .. tostring(err) .. "
") end else cecho("<yellow>[SKIP]<reset> " .. module .. " (not found)
") end end
if snd and snd.initialize then snd.initialize(false) cecho("<green>[S&D]<reset> Reload complete! Loaded " .. loadedCount .. " modules.
") else cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Reload failed - snd object not created
") end

Alias.name: sndpath
Alias.script:
local function resolveProfileDir() local home = getMudletHomeDir() local profile = getProfileName and getProfileName() or "" if profile ~= "" then local candidate = home .. "/profiles/" .. profile if io.exists(candidate) then return candidate end end return home end
local home = getMudletHomeDir() local profileDir = resolveProfileDir() local expectedPath = profileDir .. "/SearchAndDestroy/" if not io.exists(expectedPath .. "snd_main.lua") then expectedPath = profileDir .. "/snd/" end cecho("<orange>[S&D]<reset> <cyan>Mudlet home directory:<reset> " .. home .. "
") cecho("<orange>[S&D]<reset> <cyan>Resolved profile dir:<reset> " .. profileDir .. "
") cecho("<orange>[S&D]<reset> <cyan>Expected module path:<reset> " .. expectedPath .. "
") cecho("<orange>[S&D]<reset> <cyan>snd object exists:<reset> " .. tostring(snd ~= nil) .. "
") if snd then cecho("<orange>[S&D]<reset> <cyan>snd.commands exists:<reset> " .. tostring(snd.commands ~= nil) .. "
") cecho("<orange>[S&D]<reset> <cyan>snd.initialized:<reset> " .. tostring(snd.initialized) .. "
") end
-- Check if files exist local testFile = expectedPath .. "snd_main.lua" if io.exists(testFile) then cecho("<green>[S&D]<reset> Module files found at expected location
") else cecho("<red>[S&D]<reset> Module files NOT found! Copy snd_*.lua files to:
") cecho(" " .. expectedPath .. "
") end

Alias.name: xcp
Alias.script: if not snd or not snd.commands or not snd.commands.xcp then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Module not loaded. Type <green>sndpath<reset> to diagnose or <green>sndreload<reset> to reload.\n") return end snd.commands.xcp(matches[2])

Alias.name: qw
Alias.script: if not snd or not snd.commands then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Module not loaded. Type <green>sndpath<reset> to diagnose.\n") return end snd.commands.qw(matches[2] or "")

Alias.name: qwx
Alias.script: if not snd or not snd.commands then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Module not loaded. Type <green>sndpath<reset> to diagnose.\n") return end snd.commands.qwx(matches[2] or "")

Alias.name: nx
Alias.script: if not snd or not snd.commands then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Module not loaded. Type <green>sndpath<reset> to diagnose.\n") return end snd.commands.nx()

Alias.name: ht
Alias.script: if not snd or not snd.commands then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Module not loaded. Type <green>sndpath<reset> to diagnose.\n") return end snd.commands.ht(matches[2])

Alias.name: xset
Alias.script: if not snd or not snd.commands then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Module not loaded. Type <green>sndpath<reset> to diagnose.\n") return end snd.commands.xset(matches[2])

Alias.name: snd
Alias.script: if not snd or not snd.commands then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Module not loaded. Type <green>sndpath<reset> to diagnose.\n") return end snd.commands.snd(matches[2])

Alias.name: xhelp
Alias.script: if not snd or not snd.commands then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Module not loaded. Type <green>sndpath<reset> to diagnose.\n") return end snd.commands.xhelp(matches[2])

Alias.name: go
Alias.script: if not snd or not snd.commands then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Module not loaded. Type <green>sndpath<reset> to diagnose.\n") return end snd.commands.goToIndex(matches[2])

Alias.name: qref
Alias.script: if not snd or not snd.commands then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Module not loaded. Type <green>sndpath<reset> to diagnose.\n") return end snd.commands.qref()

Alias.name: xkill
Alias.script: if not snd or not snd.commands then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Module not loaded. Type <green>sndpath<reset> to diagnose.\n") return end snd.commands.xkill()

Alias.name: xcmd
Alias.script: if not snd or not snd.commands then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Module not loaded. Type <green>sndpath<reset> to diagnose.\n") return end snd.commands.xcmd(matches[2])

Script.name: SND_Loader
Script.script:
-- Search and Destroy Mudlet Port -- Load all modules
if _G.snd_loader_in_progress then return end _G.snd_loader_in_progress = true
local function findPackagePath() local home = getMudletHomeDir() local profile = getProfileName and getProfileName() or "" local profileDir = home
if profile ~= "" then local candidate = home .. "/profiles/" .. profile if io.exists(candidate) then profileDir = candidate end end
local path = profileDir .. "/SearchAndDestroy/" if not io.exists(path .. "snd_main.lua") then path = profileDir .. "/snd/" end
return path end
local packagePath = findPackagePath() cecho("<orange>[S&D]<reset> <cyan>Loader starting from " .. packagePath .. "<reset>\n")
-- Check if directory exists local testFile = packagePath .. "snd_main.lua" if not io.exists(testFile) then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> <yellow>Module files not found!<reset>\n") cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> <yellow>Expected location: " .. packagePath .. "<reset>\n") cecho("<orange>[S&D]<reset> Please copy all snd_*.lua files to: <cyan>" .. getMudletHomeDir() .. "/SearchAndDestroy/<reset>\n") cecho("<orange>[S&D]<reset> Then type: <green>sndreload<reset>\n") _G.snd_loader_in_progress = false return end
-- Load modules in order local modules = { "snd_utils.lua", "snd_debug.lua", "snd_data.lua", "snd_main.lua", "snd_gmcp.lua", "snd_database.lua", "snd_campaign.lua", "snd_gquest.lua", "snd_conwin.lua", "snd_triggers.lua", "snd_commands.lua", "snd_navigation.lua", "snd_gui.lua", }
local loadedCount = 0 local errorCount = 0
for _, module in ipairs(modules) do local path = packagePath .. module if io.exists(path) then local ok, err = pcall(dofile, path) if not ok then cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> Failed to load " .. module .. ": " .. tostring(err) .. "\n") errorCount = errorCount + 1 else loadedCount = loadedCount + 1 end end end
cecho("<orange>[S&D]<reset> <green>Loaded " .. loadedCount .. " modules<reset>") if errorCount > 0 then cecho(" <red>(" .. errorCount .. " errors)<reset>") end echo("\n")
_G.snd_loader_in_progress = false
-- Initialize tempTimer(0.5, function() if snd and snd.initialize then snd.initialize(false) else cecho("<red>[S&D ERROR]<reset> <yellow>snd object not created - modules failed to load<reset>\n") end end)
